message:
fix: Two-Flow Type System fixes for binop test

- Add PyValue handling to toIntBig() for int() conversion on PyValue
- Extract i64 from IntResult via .asI64() in int() codegen
- Exclude string formatting from PyValue.mod() (use genStringFormat instead)
- Never treat 'self' or anytype params as uncertain in isOperandUncertain
- Remove mutated params from func_local_vars so var_renames lookup works

Fixes infinite loop in gcd() where loop condition used immutable param
instead of mutable copy, and IntResult type mismatch in struct fields.
